summary: RX.3 producer representation review is closed as pass_with_conditions. The table/data first-lane mutation review is authorized for A75, A76, and A79; A76 must include A14, A04, and A61 as needs. A77 and A78 may proceed later as graph-lane review candidates after A75 and with PV graph-stage constraints. A80, A81, and graphical MO=MK remain held. No unit mutation is authorized by this gate closure.

a76_dependency_decision.rationale: A76 is source-value aware because P, GTK, and Q are often selected from producer data before applying the profit formula.

accepted_outcomes: The producer surface remains split into table/data and graph lanes.
A75, A76, and A79 are authorized for bounded first-lane mutation review.
A76 must include A61 in addition to A14 and A04 because it is source-value aware.
A77 and A78 may proceed later as graph-lane review candidates after A75 and with PV graph-stage constraints.
All newly approved A-domain producer-representation units must remain generator-blocked and non-interactive until generator/projection support exists.
blocked_outcomes: Do not mutate A75, A76, or A79 until a separate mutation-review gate explicitly authorizes CLI execution.
Do not mutate A77 or A78 in the first table/data lane.
Do not mutate A80 or A81 until PV producer-graph pilot templates exist.
Do not move HOLD_GRAPHICAL_MO_MK_OPTIMUM out of held status without separate design review.
Do not mutate authored source files.
Do not patch RAG chunks by hand.
Do not expose new producer-representation units in student-facing skill-tree use before generator implementation.
Do not authorize student diagnostics, adaptive routing, student-facing AI, automatic sequencing, mastery decisions, summative decisions, or student-facing PV projection.

explicit_decisions.decision: Keep table/data producer work split from graph-stage producer work.
Authorize bounded mutation review for A75, A76, and A79 only.
A76 must include A14, A04, and A61 as needs.
A77 and A78 may proceed after A75 and with PV graph-stage constraints.
Hold A80 and A81 until PV producer-graph pilot templates exist.
Hard block student-facing use until generator/projection support exists.

conditions_to_reopen_or_pass: Run live numbering check immediately before mutation.
Use unit-add.js only; no hand edits to references/machine.
Preserve the split between table/data lane and graph lane.
Record the A76 dependency decision in the next mutation-review closure and mutation log.
A76 must include A14, A04, and A61 as needs.
Keep graphical MO=MK held unless explicitly re-approved.
Keep A80 and A81 held until PV producer-graph pilot templates exist.
Mark any newly added A-domain units generator-blocked and non-interactive.
Do not authorize diagnostics, adaptive routing, student-facing AI, automatic sequencing, mastery decisions, summative use, or student-facing PV projection.
allowed_next_step_scope: prepare CLI mutation plan without executing it
record A76 needs as A14, A04, A61
stop for explicit mutation authorization before unit-add.js execution
